title: [PyCDE] An update for parameterized extern modules

features.name: parameterized extern module with multiple distinct instantiations
features.description: Code should include a parameterized extern module declaration whose data-port width is driven by a parameter, then instantiated twice with different parameter values so that each instance has a different port width

features.name: parameterized module port width mismatch across instantiations
features.description: Code should include two instantiations of the same parameterized module where each instantiation supplies a different integer parameter value, causing the inferred port vector widths to differ between instances
